commands.author: dataCenter430
commands.command: the revised commit addresses both p2 findings: - reverted the blanket 428 = terminal treatment in isnonretryablewebclosestatus — 428 stays on the retry path since baileys uses disconnectreason.connectionclosed = 428 for generic transient closes. - opening-phase catch now routes 428 through consumereconnectattempt() (retry with backoff, stop after max attempts) instead of rethrowing to the generic channel manager. - added changelog.md entry (p3).
commands.freeform_prompt: The revised commit addresses both P2 findings: - Reverted the blanket 428 = terminal treatment in isNonRetryableWebCloseStatus — 428 stays on the retry path since Baileys uses DisconnectReason.connectionClosed = 428 for generic transient closes. - Opening-phase catch now routes 428 through consumeReconnectAttempt() (retry with backoff, stop after max attempts) instead of rethrowing to the generic channel manager. - Added CHANGELOG.md entry (P3).
